case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. KAMBIZ CHARALAGHI et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHARALAGHI, KAMBIZ DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST KURTISS A. JACOBS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-04-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-19-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 CONTINUED TO FEB-03-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2010 CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-05-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
